case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. CORY R REESE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-22-2022 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON FEB-23-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. AMIT TANEJA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF DISCOVERY BANK VIA COURTCALL. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL BY SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT CORY REESE. THE COURT SETS ORDERS TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. AMIT TANEJA AND SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT CORY REESE FOR MAR-18-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 EACH, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PARTIES MAY FILE A DECLARATION, OR IF SANCTIONS PAID BY 03/17/22 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO TOMORROW, FEB-23-2022, AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR COUNSEL TO OBTAIN A STIPULATION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. COUNSEL TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Mar-18-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR OSC
Off Calendar Mar-17-2022 Off Calendar

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, been assigned by Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Cory R. Reese, a/k/a Cory Reese.
Dept: 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:16 a.m.

Jason Burrows, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Discover Bank.
Mario DiLorenzo, Vendor Analyst and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Burrows and DiLorenzo appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Cory R. Reese, a/k/a Cory Reese.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts (Account Stated and Money Lent) was filed on March 10, 2021.
Defendant's General Denial was filed on July 21, 2021.
Notice of Time and place of Trial was served on 09/30/2021, setting trial for 02/22/2022. On 02/23/2022 Department 206 assigned this matter to Department 514 for Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing on 02/28/2022. Plaintiff Discover Bank noticed defendant Cory R. Reese, a/k/a Cory Reese of today's hearing.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief and Exhibit List were filed January 20, 2022.
DOE defendants have not been dismissed.

Plaintiff Discover Bank submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Billing Statements.........................................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court issued its TENTATIVE RULING (pending plaintiff filing a DOE Dismissal) in favor of plaintiff Discover Bank, and against defendant Cory R. Reese, a/k/a Cory Reese, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $8,898.57.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - $312.00.
Total - $9,210.57.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Counsel to e-file a Request for Dismissal of the DOE defendants with the Clerk's Office, forthwith.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:31 a.m.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-22-2022 Continued To Feb-23-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2021 Set For Trial On Feb-22-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
